responses:
theorem P2_imp_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X}
    (h : Topology.P2 (X:=X) A) :
    Topology.P1 (X:=X) A := by
  intro x hxA
  have : x ∈ interior (closure (interior A)) := h hxA
  exact Set.interior_subset this

theorem Topology.P2_implies_P1
    {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 (X := X) A → Topology.P1 (X := X) A := by
  intro h
  exact h.trans interior_subset
